sentences.text: 李贤 很 穷。
sentences.english: Lee Hyun is very poor.

sentences.text: 李贤 在 工厂 工作。
sentences.english: He works in a factory.

sentences.text: 后来 在 加油站 工作。
sentences.english: Later he also works at a gas station.

sentences.text: 身体 很 坏。
sentences.english: His body is in bad shape.

sentences.text: 钱 不 多。
sentences.english: He does not have much money.

sentences.text: 李贤 和 奶奶 妹妹 在 家里。
sentences.english: Lee Hyun lives at home with his grandma and younger sister.

sentences.text: 奶奶 生病。
sentences.english: His grandma is sick.

sentences.text: 李贤 有 游戏 账号。
sentences.english: Lee Hyun has a game account.

sentences.text: 李贤 把 账号 卖 了。
sentences.english: He sells the account.

sentences.text: 奶奶 和 妹妹 都 很 高兴。
sentences.english: His grandma and sister are very happy.

sentences.text: 可是 坏 人 来 了。
sentences.english: But bad men come.

sentences.text: 李贤 父亲 的 债 还 在。
sentences.english: His father's debt is still there.

sentences.text: 坏 人 拿 很 多 钱。
sentences.english: The bad men take a lot of money.

sentences.text: 李贤 很 生气。
sentences.english: Lee Hyun is very angry.

sentences.text: 后来 李贤 学 练 剑 也 学 皇家之路。
sentences.english: Later he trains with a sword and studies Royal Road too.

sentences.text: 一 年 后 李贤 买 胶囊。
sentences.english: One year later, he buys a capsule.

sentences.text: 李贤 进入 皇家之路。
sentences.english: Lee Hyun enters Royal Road.

sentences.text: 李贤 的 名字 是 杂草。
sentences.english: His name there is Weed.

sentences.text: 杂草 是 人类角色。
sentences.english: Weed starts as a human avatar.

sentences.text: 杂草 来 到 塞拉堡城。
sentences.english: He arrives at the Citadel of Serabourg.

sentences.text: 罗森海姆 的 人 很 多。
sentences.english: Rosenheim is full of people.

sentences.text: 杂草 觉得 这 个 世界 很 真。
sentences.english: The world feels very real to him.

sentences.text: 杂草 不 去 别 的 地方。
sentences.english: Weed does not go anywhere else.

sentences.text: 杂草 先 去 训练场。
sentences.english: He goes to the training hall first.

sentences.text: 杂草 一直 打 训练稻草人 用 木剑 练 身体。
sentences.english: He keeps hitting the training scarecrow with a wooden sword to train his body.

sentences.text: 教官 看 了 很 高兴。
sentences.english: The instructor sees this and feels happy.

sentences.text: 后来 教官 给 杂草 任务 找 月光 的 真相。
sentences.english: Later the instructor gives Weed a quest to find the truth about the moonlight.

sentences.text: 杂草 去 雕刻店 找 店主。
sentences.english: Weed goes to the sculpture shop to find the shopkeeper.

sentences.text: 店主 先 不 高兴 后来 很 高兴。
sentences.english: At first the shopkeeper is not happy, but later he is happy.

sentences.text: 然后 店主 说 王宫 有 月光 雕刻 的 传说。
sentences.english: Then the shopkeeper says there is a moonlight carving legend in the palace.

sentences.text: 这 个 传说 是 扎哈布 的 事。
sentences.english: This legend is about Zahab.

sentences.text: 后来 杂草 去 酒馆 找 吟游诗人。
sentences.english: Later Weed goes to a tavern to find a bard.

sentences.text: 又 去 找 旧女仆。
sentences.english: Then he goes to find the old maid.

sentences.text: 杂草 明白 扎哈布 和 伊凡王后 的 约定。
sentences.english: Weed learns about the promise between Zahab and Queen Evane.

sentences.text: 刺客 来 的 时候 扎哈布 用 剑 雕刻 月光。
sentences.english: When assassins come, Zahab uses his sword to carve the moonlight.

sentences.text: 杂草 得到 月光雕刻师。
sentences.english: Weed receives the Moonlight Sculptor class.

sentences.text: 可是 杂草 不 要。
sentences.english: But Weed says no.
